sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n111638" key="fi/lumnos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φίλ-υμνος</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ῐ]</pron>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n111638.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">loving song,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4105.tlg001:32:16" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Anacreont.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">32.16</biblScope> </bibl> (cj. <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Steph.</author> </bibl> for <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">φίλυπνε</foreign>).</sense> </entryFree>
